relationships.context: Tiffany outlines the club concept strategy for Zo
Zo hand-picks passionate users as club leaders with budgets and incentives
Leaders run weekly/bi-weekly rituals as part of the program
Leaders distill member feedback back to Zo team
Friday surveys feed into the feedback loop system
Clubs effectively become semi-autonomous product councils
Exclusive selection framing as part of club lore and status
